textPlain: This is awesome.What’s your plan for pricing?In my opinion: you should bundle this as an offline electron app that can save to the filesystem and get integrated into existing PLM. and/or sell a team plan that offers cloud design & library sync… and partner with that YC company doing wire harness machines for a “buy now” button
This looks great and well designed.If you want a bigger parts library, let us know at Volition:https://govolition.com/nick@govolition.com
